column3:
Controls Auto Slot Allocation for parking.

Configuration:
- autoSlotAllocate=true  & enableGridFloorPlan=false → Enables Auto Slot Allocation
- autoSlotAllocate=false & enableGridFloorPlan=true  → Enables Grid-based parking

Note: These properties should be configured together to select the parking mode.
